calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of And To Set Aside Purported Amendment To Trust And Deed To Real Property; To Declare No-Contest Clause Unenforceabl
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of And To Set Aside Purported Amendment To Trust And Deed To Real Property; To Declare No-Contest Clause Unenforceabl
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Continued To Sep-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Bridges for Petitioners.
Charles Wolff for Judy Tsuyuki (Respondent).

Ms. Bridges stated that they are interested in mediation and that she also needs to amend her petition for appointment of a Temporary Trustee. Mr. Wolff stated that he will object to that, that they have done some discovery, that he is amenable to discussing mediation and that he sees no reason why a Temporary Trustee is needed. The Parties agreed to do private mediation. Mediation is to be completed no later than August 31, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 11, 2017. The Petition to Determine Invalidity of and to Set Aside Purported Amendment to Trust and Deed to Real Property, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on September 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Moret. Not reported.
